language_disclaimer_text: This Terms of Service is provided in multiple languages for convenience only. In the event of any inconsistency, discrepancy, or conflict between the English version and any translated version, the English version shall prevail and be legally binding.
welcome: Welcome to the RoPA (Record of Processing Activities) Application (“Application”), owned and operated by VigilPrivacy Data (“Company”, “we”, “us”, or “our”). By accessing, registering, or using the Application, you (“User”, “Customer”, “Organization”, “you”, or “your”) agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (“Terms”). These Terms create a legally binding agreement. If you do not agree, do not use the Application.

no_misuse: You must not attempt to disrupt, damage, or gain unauthorized access to the Application, its servers, or any connected systems. This includes activities such as hacking, introducing malware, or exploiting vulnerabilities.

you_must_not_upload_share_or_use_content: You must not upload, share, or use content that infringes on the intellectual property rights of others.

you_must_not_share_your_account_credenti: You must not share your account credentials with unauthorized third parties or allow them to access the Application through your account.

All third-party processors will be bound by contractual obligations to maintain confidentiality, security, and compliance with applicable data protection laws.

while_we_strive: While we strive for high availability, VigilPrivacy Data does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service. Service may be affected by factors outside our reasonable control, including internet disruptions, third-party failures, or force majeure events.

support_you_in_fulfilling_any_legal_or_r: Support you in fulfilling any legal or regulatory reporting obligations related to the incident.

Export Window: You may request a data export within 30 days of termination. Deletion: Customer Data may be permanently deleted after the expiry of applicable retention windows.
